div.h1: SQ Polling Mode — Kernel Thread Architecture

div.p:
Core 0: Application logic + Ring Management
Core 1: io_sq_thread (Polls SQ)
Core 2-N: Kernel Worker Threads (IO Completion)

ol.li: Memory Barriers: atomic_store_release on tail is mandatory to ensure SQE data is visible before the index updates.
Idle Kick: If the kernel thread goes to SLEEPING, the app must call io_uring_enter with IORING_ENTER_SQ_WAKEUP.
Privilege: IORING_SETUP_SQPOLL usually requires CAP_SYS_ADMIN or root.
